name: imbas-os
description: Local-first vault for AI-generated artifacts — save, sandbox, version, search, and export AI context.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput & wait-on dist/main/app.js dist/preload/api.cjs && IMBAS_OS_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ARTIFACT_VAULT_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-demo-assets.mjs && vite build
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run docs:llms:check && npm run build && npm run android:check && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:security
scripts.check: npm test && npm run docs:llms:check && npm run build && npm run android:check
scripts.package:dev: npm run verify && node scripts/package-dev-preview.mjs && npm run verify:preview
